description: Enjoy ail the benefits of living in a master planned community at Polygon's East Ridge at Cooper Meadows. These 4 bedroom, 2.5 bathrooms are corner homes allowing lots of natural light to brighten your home. These homes feature a double  garage, a convenient powder room on the main and spacious kitchen for friends and family to gather. These homes also boast a heat pump system to help keep your home the perfect temperature all year and access to the cooper club, a resident-only clubhouse featuring resort-style amenities such as a pool, fitness studio and more! We are open daily except 12-5 pm, Visit us at 3025 McMillan Road to learn more!
